summary: Android Auto Integration Testing Complete. All 10 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend web app loads correctly without errors, Profile page has Android Auto menu entry that navigates to /android-auto screen.

issues: Expected value to be of type number, but found null (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: Backend /api/car/next-stops (line 704-712): Returns list of incomplete stops sorted by order, limited by query param. Works correctly.
Backend /api/car/stop-action (line 667-701): Handles delivered/skip/failed actions, updates delivery_status and completed fields correctly.
Frontend profile.tsx (line 110-123): Android Auto menu item with proper data-testid='profile-android-auto-menu-item' navigates to /android-auto.
Frontend android-auto.tsx: Informational screen showing Dev Build mode, included features, and build steps.
Frontend _layout.tsx (line 8, 26-28): Imports and registers Android Auto via registerAndroidAuto() on app startup.
Frontend registerAndroidAuto.ts: Non-Android stub (no-op), ensures web doesn't import Android-only modules.
Frontend registerAndroidAuto.android.ts: Android-specific registration using react-native-android-auto reconciler.
Frontend withAndroidAuto.js config plugin: Properly adds AndroidManifest metadata and CarService for Android Auto.
seed_data_creation: Test stops created and cleaned up during test runs (TEST_ANDROID_AUTO_* prefix)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Android Auto integration verified. Backend APIs /api/car/next-stops and /api/car/stop-action working. Profile page has Android Auto menu. The Android Auto runtime is Android-only and requires Expo Development Build - web stub ensures no import errors. DEV_MODE=true in backend for testing without auth.

backend_apis.description: Returns list of incomplete stops for current user
Returns rooftop_centroid, map_pinpoint, access_navigation_point, plus_code, interpolation_status

frontend_tests.test: Web app loads without red screen/bundle error
Profile page has Android Auto menu entry
Android Auto screen shows correct content (Mode: Dev Build, etc.)
